product: Databricks Runtime 19 and Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning are in Beta
tagline: Databricks Runtime 19 and Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning are now in Beta, powered by Apache Spark 4.2.0.
what_it_does: Databricks Runtime 19 and Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning are now in Beta, powered by Apache Spark 4.2.0. For release notes, see Databricks Runtime 19 (Beta) and Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning (Beta).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Databricks Runtime 19 and Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning are now in Beta, powered by Apache Spark 4.2.0. For release notes, see Databricks Runtime 19 (Beta) and Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning (Beta).
key_takeaway: Databricks Runtime 19 and Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning are now in Beta, powered by Apache Spark 4.2.0.
